news.title:
Macquarie favors HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank due to attractive valuations amid margin pressures in India's banking sector.
HDFC Life and SBI Life are also preferred. PSU banks face weak Q4 due to treasury losses and tight liquidity.
news.summary:
Macquarie favors HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank due to attractive valuations amid margin pressures in India's banking sector.
HDFC Life and SBI Life are also preferred. PSU banks face weak Q4 due to treasury losses and tight liquidity.

news.title:
HDFC Bank confirms interest payment of Rs. 14 crore on NCDs due April 13, 2026.
Outstanding issue size is Rs. 180 crore; last interest payment was on April 15, 2025.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank confirms interest payment of Rs. 14 crore on NCDs due April 13, 2026.
Outstanding issue size is Rs. 180 crore; last interest payment was on April 15, 2025.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.
Rapid fire: Sell GAIL, Info Edge; Buy UNO Minda, Sona BLW; Hold Asian Paints, HAL, Tata Chemicals.
news.summary:

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, CRISIL, and Swaraj Engines lead expected dividend announcements this week, with Swaraj Engines projecting Rs 109.2/share.
Investors should monitor record dates like Muthoot Finance's April 17 ex-dividend date and consider banking, engineering, and insurance sectors for opportunities.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, CRISIL, and Swaraj Engines lead expected dividend announcements this week, with Swaraj Engines projecting Rs 109.2/share.
Investors should monitor record dates like Muthoot Finance's April 17 ex-dividend date and consider banking, engineering, and insurance sectors for opportunities.

news.title:
Nifty braces for profit booking after US-Iran talks fail; crude oil prices surge above $100/barrel.
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Yes Bank results on Saturday; Nifty Bank surged 4,500 pts last week, key level 55,000.
news.summary:
Nifty braces for profit booking after US-Iran talks fail; crude oil prices surge above $100/barrel.
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Yes Bank results on Saturday; Nifty Bank surged 4,500 pts last week, key level 55,000.

news.title:
Indian banks' Q4FY26 earnings remain steady despite West Asia war risks.
Inflation, energy prices, and rural cash flows face pressure, but core performance is intact.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian markets rose ~6% last week, driven by hopes of US-Iran ceasefire and supportive global cues.
Q4 FY26 earnings from Wipro, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank are key triggers; crude prices and US-Iran talks to influence outlook.
news.summary:
Indian markets rose ~6% last week, driven by hopes of US-Iran ceasefire and supportive global cues.

HDFC Bank's Rs 800 put options saw 2,066 contracts traded on 10 Apr 2026.
The Rs 800 strike price, close to Rs 808 stock level, suggests nuanced market sentiment.

news.title:
ADRs for Indian stocks are losing relevance as domestic markets deepen, easing global access and liquidity.
HDFC Bank and Infosys ADRs highlight declining premiums, reflecting reduced foreign investor reliance on ADRs.
news.summary:

news.title:

L&T, IndiGo, and HDFC Bank lead the losing stocks on the indices.

news.title:
HDFC Bank ranks third among private lenders in large defaulter exposure, with dues of Rs 54,315 crore as of Feb 2026.
HDFC Bank's cautious lending keeps its exposure lower than ICICI Bank's Rs 2.78 lakh crore and Axis Bank's Rs 66,338 crore.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank ranks third among private lenders in large defaulter exposure, with dues of Rs 54,315 crore as of Feb 2026.
HDFC Bank's cautious lending keeps its exposure lower than ICICI Bank's Rs 2.78 lakh crore and Axis Bank's Rs 66,338 crore.

news.title:
Helios Flexi Cap Fund increased stake in HDFC Bank to 5.72% AUM and exited IOCL, HPCL amidst OMC challenges.
New additions include Solar Industries (1.06% AUM), BSE (0.97% AUM), and GMR Airports; banks lead portfolio sectors at 15.6%.
news.summary:
Helios Flexi Cap Fund increased stake in HDFC Bank to 5.72% AUM and exited IOCL, HPCL amidst OMC challenges.
New additions include Solar Industries (1.06% AUM), BSE (0.97% AUM), and GMR Airports; banks lead portfolio sectors at 15.6%.

There are 4,914 recovery cases still awaiting resolution.

news.title:
BofA sees upside in Indian bank stocks due to attractive valuations, with HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank trading below historical averages.
IT sector faces short-term AI disruption, despite rupee-driven rally; BofA rates banks 'Overweight' and IT 'Underweight'.
news.summary:

news.title:
HDFC Bank, Kotak, and IDFC First Bank stocks delivered muted 5-year returns of 2.1%, 5.9%, and 5.7%, underperforming FDs offering 30-40% returns.
Broader market outperformed; Sensex grew 92%, while ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, and Federal Bank saw 94%, 81%, and 230% gains, respectively.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, Kotak, and IDFC First Bank stocks delivered muted 5-year returns of 2.1%, 5.9%, and 5.7%, underperforming FDs offering 30-40% returns.
Broader market outperformed; Sensex grew 92%, while ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, and Federal Bank saw 94%, 81%, and 230% gains, respectively.

The guidelines aim to enhance governance by shifting focus to strategic matters.
